metadata.description: Thunder — token-minimal codebase comprehension plugins, one per language/stack.

plugins.name: thunder-java
plugins.description: Token-minimal comprehension, exploration and navigation of Java/Spring Boot codebases (hierarchical YAML index: technical + inferred functional layer).

plugins.name: thunder-angular
plugins.description: Token-minimal comprehension, exploration and navigation of Angular/TypeScript codebases (components, services, routes, NgModules, DI graph + inferred functional layer).

plugins.name: thunder-python
plugins.description: Token-minimal comprehension, exploration and navigation of Python codebases — FastAPI / Flask / Django / plain (routes, models, classes, DI, framework-aware + inferred functional layer).

plugins.name: thunder-node
plugins.description: Token-minimal comprehension, exploration and navigation of Node.js backend codebases — Express / Fastify / NestJS (controllers, services, HTTP endpoints, DI graph, framework-aware + inferred functional layer).

plugins.name: thunder-react
plugins.description: Token-minimal comprehension, exploration and navigation of React.js codebases (function/class components, custom hooks, React Router routes, prop & dependency graph + inferred functional layer).

plugins.name: thunder-mind
plugins.description: Framework-agnostic shared project-decision index: capture architectural / technical / functional decisions as committed YAML and recall them (inverted-index + BM25, bounded alignment brief) so two developers' AIs reuse the same decisions instead of diverging.
